families.name: EMT-differentiation axis
families.rationale: Advanced CRC shows EMT activation (ZEB1 up) with loss of epithelial differentiation (CDX2 down), defining an invasion axis.
families.skeptic_test: Reject if delta_baseline < 0.05 or permutation p > 0.05 against label shuffles.

families.name: Proliferation vs differentiation contrast
families.rationale: Stage III-IV tumors typically combine high proliferative drive (TOP2A) with reduced enterocyte differentiation (CDX2).
families.skeptic_test: Reject if AUC < 0.58 or delta_baseline < 0.04 vs single-gene models.

families.name: Mesenchymal-epithelial balance
families.rationale: Stromal/mesenchymal program (FN1, VIM) rising relative to epithelial adhesion (EPCAM) tracks invasive progression.
families.skeptic_test: Reject if bootstrap CI for coefficient sign crosses zero or permutation p > 0.05.

families.name: Hypoxia-glycolysis stress index
families.rationale: Advanced tumors upregulate hypoxia/glycolysis (VEGFA, SLC2A1) while losing differentiation, candidate metabolic-stage law.
families.skeptic_test: Reject if delta_baseline < 0.03 or if VEGFA/SLC2A1 coefficients are not concordant in sign.

families.name: Housekeeping contrast (negative control)
families.rationale: Housekeeping genes should not encode stage information; included as ex-ante negative control.
families.skeptic_test: Expected to fail: permutation p > 0.2 and delta_baseline < 0.02; if it passes, suspect normalization artifact.
